projectOverview.cleanDescription: Develop a comprehensive web-based platform that enables users to efficiently book, modify, and cancel appointments or reserve resources, while providing administrators with robust tools for managing services, availability, and bookings.
projectOverview.businessGoal: Streamline the appointment and resource booking process, significantly reduce administrative overhead, minimize booking errors, and enhance overall user satisfaction by providing a convenient, self-service digital booking experience.

objectives: Enable end-users to easily discover, book, modify, and cancel appointments or resource reservations online, 24/7.
Provide service providers and administrators with an intuitive interface to manage services, availability schedules, and all bookings efficiently.
Automate the booking process to reduce manual errors, improve operational efficiency, and lower administrative costs.
Ensure a secure, reliable, and user-friendly platform that enhances the overall experience for both customers and administrators.

stakeholders.description: Individuals or entities who will use the system to browse services, check availability, make new bookings, and manage existing reservations.
Personnel responsible for offering services or managing resources, setting availability, confirming bookings, and overseeing the booking schedule.
IT personnel responsible for the system's deployment, maintenance, technical support, and user management.

functionalRequirements.title: User Account Management
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow users to register for an account, log in, manage their profile information (e.g., name, contact details), and reset their password.
acceptance_criteria: A new user can successfully register and log in to the system.
A logged-in user can update their profile information and save changes.
A user can successfully request and complete a password reset process.

functionalRequirements.title: Service/Resource Browsing and Search
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow users to browse available services or resources, view their details (description, duration, pricing), and search for specific services based on criteria like name, category, or availability.
acceptance_criteria: Users can view a list of all available services/resources with their key details.
Users can filter services/resources by category.
Users can search for services/resources by keyword and receive relevant results.

functionalRequirements.title: Appointment/Resource Booking
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall enable users to select a service/resource, choose an available date and time slot, and confirm their booking. The system must prevent double-booking for the same slot.
acceptance_criteria: A user can select an available time slot and successfully complete a booking.
The system displays a confirmation message with booking details upon successful reservation.
The system prevents a user from booking an already taken time slot.

functionalRequirements.title: Booking Modification and Cancellation
functionalRequirements.description: Authenticated users shall be able to view their upcoming bookings, and initiate modifications (e.g., reschedule) or cancellations, subject to predefined business rules (e.g., cancellation policy).
acceptance_criteria: A user can view a list of all their upcoming bookings.
A user can successfully reschedule an upcoming booking to a new available slot.
A user can successfully cancel an upcoming booking, and the system reflects the change.

functionalRequirements.title: Administrator Service/Resource Management
functionalRequirements.description: Administrators shall have the ability to add new services/resources, update existing service/resource details, and mark services/resources as active or inactive.
acceptance_criteria: An administrator can create a new service/resource with all required details.
An administrator can update the name, description, duration, and pricing of an existing service/resource.
An administrator can enable or disable a service/resource, affecting its visibility to end-users.

functionalRequirements.title: Automated Notifications
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall send automated email confirmations for new bookings, modifications, and cancellations, as well as reminders for upcoming appointments to users.
acceptance_criteria: Users receive an email confirmation immediately after making a new booking.
Users receive an email notification when their booking is modified or canceled.
Users receive a reminder email X hours/days before their scheduled appointment.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Performance: System Response Time
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall respond to user requests (e.g., loading pages, confirming bookings) within 3 seconds under normal load (up to 100 concurrent users).

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Security: Data Protection
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: All user data (personal information, booking details) and communication between the client and server shall be encrypted using industry-standard protocols (e.g., HTTPS, TLS 1.2+). The system shall comply with GDPR and CCPA principles for data handling.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Usability: Intuitive User Interface
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system's user interface shall be intuitive, easy to navigate, and consistent across all pages, allowing users to complete booking tasks with minimal effort and without requiring extensive training.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Scalability: Concurrent Users
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall be capable of supporting at least 1,000 active users and processing 100 concurrent booking requests without significant degradation in performance.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Availability: System Uptime
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The booking system shall maintain an uptime of 99.5% or higher, excluding planned maintenance windows.

assumptions: Users will have access to a reliable internet connection and a modern web browser (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari) to access the system.
The client will provide all necessary content for services/resources, including descriptions, images, and pricing structures.
Initial deployment will focus on a single instance/location model, with multi-location capabilities considered for future phases.
All user data will be handled in compliance with applicable data privacy regulations (e.g., GDPR, CCPA).
constraints: The project must be delivered within a six-month timeline from the project kickoff date.
The system must be a web-based application, accessible via a URL, and not require desktop client installation.
Development must adhere to the allocated budget as defined in the project proposal.
Integration with external payment gateways or third-party calendar systems is out of scope for the initial phase unless explicitly defined.
acceptanceCriteria: All identified functional requirements are implemented and pass their respective acceptance criteria.
The system meets all defined non-functional requirements as verified by testing and monitoring.
The system is successfully deployed to a production environment and is accessible to all intended stakeholders.
Key stakeholders (Customers, Service Providers, System Administrators) confirm that the system effectively addresses their primary needs and objectives.
